replies_today.reply: This video directly addresses public commentary about his previous bare-handed snake handling. It's a response, not an isolated act.
Marco Rubio is a Senator, not Secretary of State. The agreements are unverified. DHS wants to encourage voluntary returns, not just deport.
Thomas Mandl designed the "One World Flag" in 2016 with the blue circle and transparent background. The skull and knives are not part of any recognized flag proposal.

"The people are our bosses" is a sentiment often expressed, but real accountability requires more than words. Transparency in campaign funding and lobbying is crucial to see who elected officials truly serve.
